pages.text: Long-lived humanoid. Slender, fey-touched. After picking Elf, the player picks a lineage — High, Wood, or Sea — on a second screen.$(br2)Height: 1.05$(br)Width: 0.95$(br2)$(bold)Low-Light Vision.$() Faint night vision (strength 0.3). Does not function underwater.$(br2)$(bold)Trance.$() Phantom attacks deal no damage.$(br2)$(bold)Frail.$() Maximum health 18 (9 hearts).$(br2)$(bold)Light-Footed.$() Knockback resistance reduced by 0.10.
